title: ruta graveolens f. variegata
intro: Ruta graveolens f. variegata is a variant of the common rue plant, known for its distinctive variegated leaves and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating skin conditions such as acne, wounds, and eczema. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens f. variegata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
